Under APPI, these are personal data and individual numbers; My Number is used only for tax/insurances and not transferred to any acquirer before closing; encrypted at rest; retention 5 years post-employment.
Under FIEA, undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts (price range, board resolution date, number of shares, schedule) are MNPI; access limited to the board and deal team until public disclosure.
Until a press release is filed via the Tokyo Meridian Exchange disclosure system, these facts remain non-public; draft minutes and valuation models are labeled “MNPI—FIEA”.
Negative clarification: we do not collect Bluetooth or Wi‑Fi MAC addresses; “mac” references in IT inventory denote Apple MacBook Air units only and are not network identifiers.
DSAR: submit via privacy@hinodematerials.co.jp or hxxps://privacy.hinode.co.jp/request?type=access; we verify identity using HR employee code (e.g., HM-4472) and never request full M y N u m b e r by email.
Transfers: within Japan to processors such as KitaCloud G.K. (Tokyo DC-2) and Aomori Trust Securities Co., Ltd. for shareholder registry support; cross-border transfers are not expected for this matter.
Vendor logs may include device model and city (e.g., “Chofu-shi”, “SoraTab A2”, time 21:45 JST) without names; these alone are not treated as identifying an individual.
Sample analytics datasets may show “dob: 1992-03”, “role: analyst”, “location: Nagoya-shi”, “account suffix **34”, or “router-113ab7”; these generic fields are separated from any person.
Securities workflow note: pre-announcement board decks (TOB timing and price corridor) are stored in /Finance/Meridian/TOB_2026 and access is logged (user id hm-board-07, s e s s i o n j p 0 7 X).
Retention: MNPI artifacts are retained until 7 years post-closing; employee personnel files retain only minimal data (e.g., role history, evaluations) and no device telemetry beyond 90 days.
